mapper.select: WITH treatment_window AS ( SELECT t.treatment_information_id, COALESCE( t.device_bind_time, ( SELECT MIN(ss.step_time) FROM surgery_step ss WHERE ss.treatment_information_id = t.treatment_information_id ), t.surgery_start_time ) AS start_time, COALESCE( t.recovery_end_time, ( SELECT MAX(wp2.time) FROM waveform_parameter wp2 WHERE wp2.treatment_information_id = t.treatment_information_id ) ) AS end_time FROM treatment_information t WHERE t.treatment_information_id = #{treatmentInformationId} ) SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', wp.time) + INTERVAL '5 minute' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM wp.time - DATE_TRUNC('hour', wp.time)) / 300) AS time, wp.parameter_id AS parameterId, AVG(wp.value) AS value FROM waveform_parameter wp JOIN treatment_window tw ON tw.treatment_information_id = wp.treatment_information_id WHERE wp.treatment_information_id = #{treatmentInformationId} AND (tw.start_time IS NULL OR wp.time >= tw.start_time) AND (tw.end_time IS NULL OR wp.time <= tw.end_time) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', wp.time) + INTERVAL '5 minute' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM wp.time - DATE_TRUNC('hour', wp.time)) / 300), wp.parameter_id ORDER BY time, parameterId
